text:
Market today: The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 is seeing significant activity, suggesting a dynamic session for your concentrated portfolio. Broader market mood is active, with tech names likely driving a lot of the action.

Your holdings: SOXL is down 24.38% and SPAL, a brand-new, very volatile leveraged ETF, is already down 20.66%. Both are leveraged and decay, amplifying drops on margin. Monitor their stops closely.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the Nasdaq 100 for continued momentum or reversals, and strictly adhere to stops on your leveraged positions.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged holdings while staying alert to tech sector movements.
plays: SOXL is well below its 200 stop at 192.45; consider trimming or exiting to manage leveraged risk.
SPAL is trading at 19.95, below its 21.38 stop; review this new, volatile leveraged position immediately.
XLK shows an Accumulate setup (entry 185.16-184.98, stop 184.65) aligning with Nasdaq 100 activity.
